purpose: Append one insight to LAN index, write one raw payload, attempt best-effort sync + import.
must: insights_count must increase by exactly 1 (jq '.insights | length')
insights/raw/<RAW_HASH>.json must be created (exactly 1 new file)
stdout last line must match: ^\[teambrain-share\] added [0-9a-f]{64}$
may: logs/teambrain-share.log appended by best-effort rsync-merge.sh / teamagent-import.sh subprocesses
cache/ directory created if not present
must_not: delete any existing file in insights/ or raw/
open new rsync/ssh/teamagent socket when teammates.json is missing
invoke teamagent ingest when teamagent binary is missing
notes: stdout reports CONTENT_HASH (hash of name|when|description), but the raw file on disk uses RAW_HASH (hash of payload). These are different fields by design — do not flag as anomaly.
Idempotent on identical name+when+description (CONTENT_HASH dedup): a duplicate call should leave insights_count unchanged and create no new raw file.
